# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 with performance focus** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates to Skia milestone m151 with allocation-free rendering paths and WASM/.NET 11 support. This preview brings the full m151 engine upgrade, multiple upstream bug-fix merges, and a sweep of zero-allocation improvements across the HarfBuzz and text pipelines. It also adds Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for WASM on .NET 11.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine advances to m151, including multiple upstream Chrome/m151 bug-fix merge rounds that improve stability and correctness across rendering backends. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294), [#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))
- **SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition dropped** — A stale SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition in the Skia submodule that caused WASM build warnings has been removed. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing gains ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — SKColor parsing is optimized and new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads are added, reducing allocations for hot string-to-color conversion paths. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **Allocation-free text and tag parsing** — HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 now uses pooled UTF-8 encoding, and per-call char[4] allocations in HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse are eliminated — reducing GC pressure in high-frequency shaping loops. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))
- **Zero-copy SKShaper glyph result access** — SKShaper now reads glyph results via zero-copy spans, avoiding intermediate buffer copies on the hot shaping path. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — A native resource was leaked when calling SKImage.FromEncodedData with a region rectangle. The handle is now released correctly. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
- **GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context** — An unnecessary unsafe modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed; the type is now fully safe. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Platform

- **WASM: Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11** — Prebuilt Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included for WASM targets targeting .NET 11. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Adds allocation-free UTF-8 encoding in Buffer.AddUtf8 via pooled encoding, and eliminates per-call char[4] allocations in Tag.Parse — measurably reducing GC pressure in high-frequency text-shaping workloads. Also includes the Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM static libraries.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Fixed the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition in the Skia submodule, added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for WASM on .NET 11, and contributed a visual regression test harness. ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 delivered a performance sweep — allocation-free HarfBuzz text encoding, zero-copy SKShaper spans, ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads for SKColor — plus upstream m151 bug fixes and the GRContextOptions unsafe removal.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151.0 line with the Skia m151 engine upgrade and a WASM submodule fix that dropped a stale SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
